title: Neon Colouring Craft Set - 100 Page Colouring Book & 8 Neon Markers Colourful Marker Pens - Kids Beginners Artist & Crafter Kit
features: 100 Pages : Features 50 pages with vibrant animal designs to colour and 50 blank pages for doodling and sketching
Neon Marker Pens : Comes with 8 bold neon colours - green, blue, pink, orange, purple, yellow, hot pink, and red - perfect for bright and funky artwork
High-Quality Paper : Thick, premium pages designed to prevent marker bleed-through, ensuring a stress-free colouring experience
Safe & Non-Toxic : The included pens are child-friendly and safe, making it a worryfree gift for parents.
Perfect for Home or Travel : Compact and easy to store, ideal for taking creativity on the go
Inspires Creativity : Encourages artistic expression and boosts confidence in young artists
Inspires Creativity: Encourages artistic expression and boosts confidence in young artists.
description: Unleash creativity with this Neon Colouring Set for Kids! Packed with 100 pages of exciting colouring and doodling fun, this set is perfect for young artists who love to express themselves with vibrant neon colours. Featuring 50 funky animal pages to colour and 50 blank pages for sketching and doodling, it offers hours of entertainment and creative exploration. The set includes 8 neon marker pens in bold, eye-catching shades—green, blue, pink, orange, purple, yellow, hot pink, and red—ensuring every masterpiece stands out. Made with high-quality, thick paper, the pages prevent ink bleed-through, making it an ideal choice for little hands. Presented in a handy gift box, this set is perfect for gifting and easy storage. Whether at home or on the go, this neon colouring set is the ultimate creative companion for kids!
